creator: drr.backup@gmail.com
text:
14.2-RELEASE Root-on-ZFS installation creates a second home directory under /mnt as '/mnt/home/<username>'. This directory is empty and does not seem to be used. Deleting it does not seem to affect the system.

Noticed this second home directory on two separate installations on bare metal and one on virtualbox. Some other users confirm this issue: https://forums.FreeBSD.org/threads/a-second-home-folder-created-under-mnt-on-freebsd-14-2-install.96144/
